traceability_views.label: Replay
traceability_views.description: What happened, knowable then, on a time axis.

default_series.disclaimer: Illustrative only — not live OHLC; shows temporal rhythm for review.
Ordinal index from stance codes — not a market return.

replay_rules: Replay lists only events at or before each point’s timestamp; copy is generated from ledger/bundle fields available for that event.
No counterfactual or hypothetical language in replay event titles or micro-briefs.
Outcome checkpoints labeled as review-time framing, not as if known historically.
counterfactual_rules: Counterfactual Lab is a separate mode; branches are not drawn as factual timeline markers.
Numeric simulation may be added later; UI grammar reserves branches only.
Copy avoids ‘you would have been rich’ or implied certainty.
replay_vs_counterfactual_rules: Replay lists only events at or before each point’s timestamp; copy is generated from ledger/bundle fields available for that event.
No counterfactual or hypothetical language in replay event titles or micro-briefs.
Outcome checkpoints labeled as review-time framing, not as if known historically.
Counterfactual Lab is a separate mode; branches are not drawn as factual timeline markers.
Numeric simulation may be added later; UI grammar reserves branches only.
Copy avoids ‘you would have been rich’ or implied certainty.
decision_quality_vs_outcome_quality_rule: Decision quality: process and evidence fit at decision time.
Outcome quality: ex-post result — may diverge from decision quality.
UI surfaces both labels; does not conflate them.

rules: Counterfactual Lab is a separate mode; branches are not drawn as factual timeline markers.

Copy avoids ‘you would have been rich’ or implied certainty.
counterfactual_scaffold.disclaimer: Hypothetical branches — no numeric engine in MVP; not shown on Replay axis.

phase47d.focus: Numeric simulation for branches, live/benchmark series, attribution wiring — still governance-bound.
